Description: Create, schedule, and restore Umbraco backups directly from the backoffice. Supports 10+ cloud storage providers: Azure Blob, Amazon S3, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, Box, Mega, Seafile, SFTP, and local file system. Backup retention policies, email notifications, and CRON-based scheduling built in. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
